title: Pre-Monsoon Preparedness Sabha
agenda: Drainage cleanup, water purification, emergency shelter planning.
resolutions: 1. Allocated 50,000 INR for drainage desilting. 2. Arranged chlorine powder distribution to all wards.

title: Development Plan Budget Approval
agenda: Reviewing proposals for road repairs, solar street light installation, and school renovation grants.

title: Drinking Water Supply Upgradation Sabha
agenda: Discussion on installing new overhead water tank, water supply timing changes.
resolutions: Approved the site for the new overhead tank near Hanuman temple. Requested water supply timing to be shifted to morning.
